name: swift-agent-toolchain
description: MCP toolchain for AI-assisted Swift/iOS development — SourceKit-LSP diagnostics, incremental builds, simulator runs, and verification loops.

interface.shortDescription: Swift development accelerator for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Bridge AI coding agents to the Swift toolchain with 21 MCP tools. SourceKit-LSP diagnostics, Xcode Bridge, regex-based semantic checks (24 patterns), architectural pattern detection, keyword-based intent checking, and simulator screenshot capture. Designed to catch common AI-generated Swift bugs: empty actions, impossible states, stale async, silent error swallowing. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot.
defaultPrompt: Use Swift Agent Toolchain to explore a SwiftUI view with live Preview.
Use Swift Agent Toolchain to fix all compile errors in this project.
Use Swift Agent Toolchain to find a Swift package for networking.
